name: Tomislav Sertic
title: Full-Stack Software Developer
about: Full-stack developer based in Zagreb, Croatia, with hands-on experience delivering enterprise-grade solutions for major international clients including Saudi Aramco, ESA, and THT. My professional work centers on customizing and extending Archibus platforms — from SQL optimization and Java backend development to HTML/JS frontend interfaces. I've worked extensively on modernizing legacy codebases by integrating React into existing enterprise systems. On the side, I design, develop, and maintain websites for clients using Next.js and TypeScript, handling everything from initial build to server deployment and ongoing maintenance. I'm driven by solving complex technical challenges, whether that means breathing new life into legacy systems or building modern applications from the ground up.

personal.dog: Eevee — a mixed breed I absolutely adore
personal.note: New dad and dog dad. Life is full.

projects_context: By day I build enterprise software solutions for international clients. The projects shown here are my hobby work — client websites for friends and acquaintances, various utility scripts that help me day-to-day, and pure experiments I build just for the fun of it.

experience.description: Archibus IWMS platform development for enterprise clients including Saudi Aramco, ESA, and THT. SQL optimization, Java backend, HTML/JS frontend, React integration into legacy systems, full-lifecycle development and deployment.

projects.name: haiku AI streamer script
projects.description: Haiku AI Streamer  is a simple console application written in Node.js that generates and saves haiku poems using AI models. It supports both  OpenAI API  and  Ollama  (local LLM models), automatically formatting the generated haiku in markdown and saving them in the haiku/ directory. Key Features: Real-time AI-generated haiku  using OpenAI or Ollama models. Automatic markdown formatting  for impro

projects.name: Braniteljska zadruga Viribus Unitis
projects.description: This project is a website for  Viribus Unitis , a cooperative founded by Croatian war veterans. The website serves as an information hub, presenting the cooperative’s mission, activities, and upcoming events. It also provides news updates and highlights sponsors who support its initiatives. projects.name: Pokémon AI Debate
projects.description: Pokémon AI Debate Project Overview Pokémon AI Debate is a web application that demonstrates the capabilities of modern AI language models by having them engage in debates about which Pokémon is superior. The application orchestrates interactions between three leading AI models: OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini : Argues for the first selected Pokémon Anthropic's Claude : Argues for the second selected Pokémon

projects.name: Portfolio Scraper & Brochure Generator CA
projects.description: This application automates the generation of brochures and reports about companies, portfolios, and websites. The user inputs a URL, and the application scrapes the webpage using BeautifulSoup, extracts key links, and utilizes the OpenAI API to analyze and summarize the information. projects.description: LLaVA Image Analyzer – AI-Powered Image Recognition LLaVA Image Analyzer is a  React-based web application  that leverages AI to analyze image content.
